'''âg-h-b''' ('''gahaba''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:caffle|caffle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-h-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:caffle|caffle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âg-h-b
|-
! Lemma
| gahaba
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gahabithi|gahabithi]] || [[word:gahabiji|gahabiji]] || [[word:gahabishi|gahabishi]] || [[word:gahabi|gahabi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gahabuthuth|gahabuthuth]] || [[word:gahabujuj|gahabujuj]] || [[word:gahabushush|gahabushush]] || [[word:gahab|gahab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gahabuthu|gahabuthu]] || [[word:gahabuju|gahabuju]] || [[word:gahabushu|gahabushu]] || [[word:gahabu|gahabu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gahabufuth|gahabufuth]] || [[word:gahabufuj|gahabufuj]] || [[word:gahabufush|gahabufush]] || [[word:gahabuf|gahabuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gahabethe|gahabethe]] || [[word:gahabeje|gahabeje]] || [[word:gahabeshe|gahabeshe]] || [[word:gahabe|gahabe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gahabothoth|gahabothoth]] || [[word:gahabojoj|gahabojoj]] || [[word:gahaboshosh|gahaboshosh]] || [[word:gahab|gahab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gahabotho|gahabotho]] || [[word:gahabojo|gahabojo]] || [[word:gahabosho|gahabosho]] || [[word:gahabo|gahabo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gahabofoth|gahabofoth]] || [[word:gahabofoj|gahabofoj]] || [[word:gahabofosh|gahabofosh]] || [[word:gahabof|gahabof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gahabĂŠthĂŠ|gahabĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:gahabĂŠjĂŠ|gahabĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:gahabĂŠshĂŠ|gahabĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:gahabĂŠ|gahabĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gahabathath|gahabathath]] || [[word:gahabajaj|gahabajaj]] || [[word:gahabashash|gahabashash]] || [[word:gahab|gahab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gahabatha|gahabatha]] || [[word:gahabaja|gahabaja]] || [[word:gahabasha|gahabasha]] || [[word:gahaba|gahaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gahabafath|gahabafath]] || [[word:gahabafaj|gahabafaj]] || [[word:gahabafash|gahabafash]] || [[word:gahabaf|gahabaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:gahabasha|gahabasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gogahabasha|gogahabasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokigahabasha|gokigahabasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:gahabnĂŒsha|gahabnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gogahabnknĂŒsha|gogahabnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokigahabnĂŒsha|gokigahabnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gahabshĂ«sha|gahabshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogahabnkshĂ«sha|gogahabnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigahabshĂ«sha|gokigahabshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gahabrosha|gahabrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogahabnkrosha|gogahabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigahabrosha|gokigahabrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gahabmusha|gahabmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gogahabnkmusha|gogahabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigahabmusha|gokigahabmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gahabsherasha|gahabsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gogahabnksherasha|gogahabnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokigahabsherasha|gokigahabsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:gahabngasha|gahabngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gogahabnkngasha|gogahabnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokigahabngasha|gokigahabngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gahabyasha|gahabyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gogahabnkyasha|gogahabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokigahabyasha|gokigahabyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gahabyamasha|gahabyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gogahabnkyamasha|gogahabnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokigahabyamasha|gokigahabyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gahabnĂŒshĂ«sha|gahabnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gogahabnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gogahabnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokigahabnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokigahabnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gahabnĂŒrosha|gahabnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogahabnknĂŒrosha|gogahabnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigahabnĂŒrosha|gokigahabnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gahabnĂŒmusha|gahabnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogahabnknĂŒmusha|gogahabnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigahabnĂŒmusha|gokigahabnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gahabshĂ«nĂŒsha|gahabshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gogahabnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gogahabnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokigahabshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokigahabshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gahabshĂ«rosha|gahabshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogahabnkshĂ«rosha|gogahabnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigahabshĂ«rosha|gokigahabshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gahabshĂ«musha|gahabshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogahabnkshĂ«musha|gogahabnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigahabshĂ«musha|gokigahabshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gahabronĂŒsha|gahabronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gogahabnkronĂŒsha|gogahabnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokigahabronĂŒsha|gokigahabronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gahabroshĂ«sha|gahabroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gogahabnkroshĂ«sha|gogahabnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokigahabroshĂ«sha|gokigahabroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gahabromusha|gahabromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogahabnkromusha|gogahabnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigahabromusha|gokigahabromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gahabmunĂŒsha|gahabmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gogahabnkmunĂŒsha|gogahabnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokigahabmunĂŒsha|gokigahabmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gahabmushĂ«sha|gahabmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gogahabnkmushĂ«sha|gogahabnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokigahabmushĂ«sha|gokigahabmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gahabmurosha|gahabmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogahabnkmurosha|gogahabnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigahabmurosha|gokigahabmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:gahab|gahab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:gĂŠhĂŠb|gĂŠhĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hogahab|hogahab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hogĂŠhĂŠb|hogĂŠhĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohogahab|hohogahab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohogĂŠhĂŠb|hohogĂŠhĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒgahab|nĂŒgahab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒgĂŠhĂŠb|nĂŒgĂŠhĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒgahab|nĂŒnĂŒgahab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒgĂŠhĂŠb|nĂŒnĂŒgĂŠhĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻgahab|nĂŻgahab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻgĂŠhĂŠb|nĂŻgĂŠhĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻgahab|nĂŻnĂŻgahab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻgĂŠhĂŠb|nĂŻnĂŻgĂŠhĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lugahab|lugahab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lugĂŠhĂŠb|lugĂŠhĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulugahab|lulugahab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulugĂŠhĂŠb|lulugĂŠhĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:ligahab|ligahab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ligĂŠhĂŠb|ligĂŠhĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liligahab|liligahab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liligĂŠhĂŠb|liligĂŠhĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kogahab|kogahab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kogĂŠhĂŠb|kogĂŠhĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokogahab|kokogahab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokogĂŠhĂŠb|kokogĂŠhĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kegahab|kegahab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kegĂŠhĂŠb|kegĂŠhĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekegahab|kekegahab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekegĂŠhĂŠb|kekegĂŠhĂŠb]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
